description: This Java class `JwtService` is responsible for creating and validating JSON Web Tokens (JWT) in a Spring Boot application. It manages JWT signing keys, issues access tokens with user info, and parses/validates tokens.

classes.name: JwtService
classes.description: Service class for creating and validating JWT tokens, managing signing keys, and extracting user info from tokens.

methods.name: issueAccessToken
methods.description: Generates a JWT access token for a given user, including roles and email claims.

methods.name: parseAndValidate
methods.description: Validates a JWT token string and returns its claims if valid.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Extracts and returns the user UUID from token claims.
